en: You know, he's got over 200 checks here.
Hands on your head! He even has little payroll envelopes.
Put it down! Drop it! Relax! You're late, alright?
My name's Alan, Barry Allen, United States Secret Service.
ko: 너 늦었어, 알겠지? 내 이름은 앨런, 배리 앨런, 미국 비밀경찰이야.

en: Your boy just tried to jump out the window. My partner has him in custody downstairs.
ko: 네 아들이 방금 창문에서 뛰어내리려고 했어.

en: I don't know what you're talking about. You think the F.B.I. are the only ones on this guy?
I mean, come on. Come on, he's dabbling in government checks here.
ko: 이 사람은 정부 수표에 손을 대고 있어.

en: I've been following a paper trail on this guy for months now.
ko: 몇 달째 이 사람의 서류를 추적하고 있어.

en: Hey, you mind taking that gun out of my face? Please, really.
ko: 저기, 내 얼굴에서 총 좀 치워줄래?

en: I mean, it makes me nervous. We see some credentials.
Yeah, sure. Take my whole wallet.
ko: 그래, 물론이지. 내 지갑 다 가져가.

en: You want my gun, too? Come over here, take my gun.
Hey, hey, look. Just do me a favor. Take a look outside. Look. Look out the window.
ko: 이봐, 이봐, 제발 부탁이야. 밖을 좀 봐줘.

en: My partner's walking him to the car as we speak. Look.
ko: 내 파트너가 지금 차로 걸어가고 있어. 봐.

en: Old guy almost pissed in his pants when I came through the door.
ko: 그 노인은 내가 문을 열고 들어가자 거의 바지를 찢을 뻔했어.

en: He jumped right through the window under the hood of my car.
ko: 내 차의 보닛 아래로 바로 뛰어들어갔어.
